## Validation

- [ ] Relevant contract tests
- [ ] Benchmark Lab non-live tests when applicable
- [ ] Full smoke test when applicable
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No secrets, private paths, raw benchmark output, or memory-vault content committed

## Architecture Check

- [ ] Local-first behavior preserved
- [ ] No unsupported model or benchmark claims
- [ ] Benchmark Lab runtime boundary preserved
- [ ] Future capabilities are not documented as implemented
- [ ] Existing API envelopes remain compatible or change is explicitly documented
